texto: Chalk again?" Cal seemed almost disappointed. "Too bad there's no chalk monster."Penn snorted with amusement. Chalk monster. That was like saying it was a vampire. Everyone knew vampires didn't exist. Zombies who drank blood to stay alive. Ridiculous.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a R. Cooper: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Chalk again?" Cal seemed almost disappointed. "Too bad there's no chalk monster."Penn snorted wit…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, funny, paranormal-romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de paranormal-romance e sarcasm.
